notes: Armed Conflict Location & Event Data. Global political violence tracking. Academic-free.
Energy Information Administration. Oil, gas, electricity, renewables, prices, production. Massive.
National Renewable Energy Lab. Solar, wind, EV stations, utility rates. One key covers all.
Spotify catalog. Artists, albums, tracks, audio features, playlists. Needs OAuth but client_credentials flow works.
Movies, TV, actors. Massive database. Very popular API. Free.
800k+ economic time series. GDP, unemployment, inflation, rates. Gold standard for macro data.
Bureau of Labor Statistics. CPI, employment, wages, productivity. 12 functions, works without key but rate-limited.
All US Census data. ACS, decennial, population, income, housing. 29 functions.
Congressional data. Bills, votes, members, amendments. Official source.
Federal Election Commission. Campaign finance, candidates, committees, filings. 10 functions.
Campaign finance, lobbying, personal finances of politicians.
State legislature data. Bills, votes, legislators for all 50 states.
Congress API. Bills, votes, members, committees. Excellent free resource.
NYT Article Search, Books, Most Popular, Movie Reviews. Free tier generous.
Guardian content API. Full articles, tags, sections. Very generous free tier.
NASA APIs. APOD, Mars rovers, asteroids, Earth imagery, EONET. One key covers all.
Earth science data. Satellite imagery, climate, ocean, atmosphere.
Climate Data Online. Historical weather, station data, normals. Massive dataset.
Same as NCDC (rebranded). Climate data v2 API.
Global air quality data. Real-time + historical from 30k+ stations worldwide.
National Vulnerability Database. CVEs, CVSS scores. Essential for security.
Internet-wide scanner. Devices, services, vulnerabilities. Free tier limited but useful.
Malware scanning. File/URL/IP reputation. Free: 4 lookups/min.
Digital Public Library of America. Aggregated US collections.
50M+ European cultural heritage objects.
ML model hub. Model metadata, datasets. Token needed for some endpoints.
Package manager data. Dependencies, versions across npm/pypi/cran/etc. Key raises limits.
Global sanctions, PEP, and criminal watchlists.
Rijksmuseum collection. Art, history objects with high-res images.
Smithsonian collections. 15M+ objects, images, metadata.
Stack Overflow / Stack Exchange Q&A. Works without key but quota is 300/day vs 10k.
Music database. Releases, artists, labels. Physical media focus.
Song lyrics and annotations.
Game database (Twitch-owned). Needs Twitch client ID.
Music data. Artists, albums, tracks, tags, listening stats.
Movie data (via IMDB IDs). Free: 1000 req/day.
Open podcast directory. 4M+ podcasts. Free and open.
Video game database. 500k+ games. Free.
Crypto prices, markets, exchanges. Free tier works but rate-limited. Already functional without key.
Ethereum blockchain explorer. Transactions, balances, contracts, tokens.
Sports betting odds. Free: 500 requests/month.
World Trade Organization. Trade statistics, tariffs.
US/Canada geocoding + reverse. Free: 2500 lookups/day.
IP geolocation + ASN + company data. Free: 50k lookups/month.
Global geocoding. Free: 2500 req/day.
Weather forecasts, current, historical. Free: 1000 calls/day.
Weather API. Free: 500 calls/day. Minute-by-minute forecasts.
Weather + astronomy + sports. Free: 1M calls/month.
College Scorecard. Tuition, graduation rates, earnings data for every US college.
State/federal bill tracking. Free tier limited.
Federal rulemaking. Search regulations, comments, dockets.
News aggregator. 80k+ sources. Free tier: 100 req/day, headlines only.
200M+ open access research papers. Full text search.
Air Quality System. Pollutant monitoring data across US.
Global fishing vessel tracking. AIS data, fishing effort.
Active fire data from satellites. Real-time wildfire monitoring.
Open access paper finder. Just needs email as key.
FoodData Central. Nutrient data for 300k+ foods. 5 functions.
IP abuse reports. Check/report malicious IPs. Free: 1000 checks/day.
Open Threat Exchange. Threat intel pulses, IOCs. Free.
Internet asset discovery. Hosts, certs, services. Free: 250 results.
Cloudflare Radar. Internet traffic, DDoS, routing, DNS trends.
Internet scanner noise. Know if an IP is benign scanner or malicious.
Nonprofit project data. Global charity/project database.
Concert setlists database.
Exchange rates. Free tier: 100 req/month, EUR base only.
Exchange rates. Free: 100 req/month. Overlaps with others.
Exchange rates. Free: 1000 req/month, USD base only.
Walk/Transit/Bike scores for addresses. Free: 5000/day.
what3words location encoding.
Motor carrier safety data.

Media monitoring. May have changed API recently.
